docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,400.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, EMILIO AS TO DEFENDANT FLYNN, DENNIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED OCT-02-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLYNN, DENNIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, EMILIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FLYNN, DENNIS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
